current_frontend_selectors.prompt-assistant-workflow-inbox: current injected Prompt Assistant inbox panel

current_frontend_functions: saveLabel() writes ai_studio_custom_nav_label and postMessage set-custom-nav-label
loadWorkflows() fetches GET /api/workflows and populates workflowSelect
runPreflight() fetches GET /api/workflows/{filename}/preflight and renders model_refs

current_storage_contract.ai_studio_custom_nav_label: string, max 12 chars in current UI
current_storage_contract.ai_studio_inbox_prompt_workflow: array, newest item at index 0, current page displays item.prompt if present

POST /api/generate.status: exists but should not become the custom-workflow product path without review
POST /api/generate.notes: takes workflow_json and can submit to ComfyUI; custom workflow page should prepare, not auto-submit

missing_or_reserved_apis.POST /api/workflows/register: planned in implementation plan; should write metadata sidecar only after review
missing_or_reserved_apis.POST /api/workflows/{id}/prepare: recommended prepare-only endpoint; must not submit ComfyUI prompt
missing_or_reserved_apis.GET /api/jobs, POST /api/jobs, GET /api/: implemented in separate isolated experiment per plan, not merged into current role scope

proposed_new_selectors.workflowRequirements: required inputs, models, custom node status
proposed_new_selectors.applyPromptPayloadButton: apply inbox payload to mapped inputs
proposed_new_selectors.prepareExecutionButton: prepare packet only; disabled if blockers exist

compatibility_rules: Do not break existing GET /api/workflows shape.
Do not break existing GET /api/workflows/{filename}/preflight shape.
Add new fields instead of renaming old fields.
Render untrusted names and messages with textContent or escaping helper.
